coding.display: Hormone receptor positive with human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 negative status

description: Offer anthracycline and taxane or non-anthracycline regimen in combination with trastuzumab for node-positive or high-risk node-negative HER2-positive disease.
name: OfferHer2DirectedNeoadjuvantRegimen
title: Offer trastuzumab-based neoadjuvant therapy for high-risk HER2-positive disease
